title: lobelia subnuda
intro: Lobelia subnuda, also known as Lobelia subnuda or Indian tobacco, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. Lobelia subnuda is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Lobelia subnuda is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
